question: please retrieve authors of imvigor211
final_sql: SELECT "Author" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Trial name" LIKE '%imvigor211%';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What trials have Name of ICI = 'tremelimumab'?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'tremelimumab';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What trials have Name of ICI = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab'?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Durvalumab, Tremelimumab';

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What are the NCT identifiers for trials where Name of ICI = 'Ipilimumab'?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab';
